ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the company in thousands */,
  "ytd_percentage" REAL /* Year-to-date percentage change in stock price */,
  "est_revenue_2023" REAL /* Estimated revenue for 2023 in billions */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's logo */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's IPO */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the analyst */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the analyst's company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the analyst's professional profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the investor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Current value of the investor's portfolio */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy (e.g., Value Investing, Growth Investing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the stock price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price entry */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "adj_closing_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index at inception */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index percentage */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the index is focused on */,
  "index_provider" TEXT /* Name of the index provider */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the index value was updated */,
  "constituents" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "financial_metrics" TEXT /* Key financial metrics included in the report */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Financial forecasts for the company */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Investment recommendation */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the report */,
  "pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to the PDF version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Trader, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID defining user permissions */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the alert is set for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price drop, earnings report) */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert condition */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert */,
  "last_triggered_date" TEXT /* Last date the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Total value of the transaction (price * amount) */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "broker" TEXT /* Name of the broker who executed the transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the transaction is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news is about */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image related to the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the news article was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
